# Febri Ardiansyah

> Fullstack Developer based in Banyuwangi, East Java, Indonesia.
> Currently working in operations while actively building web projects.

## About
Febri Ardiansyah is a self-taught fullstack developer with a background in warehouse operations at PT Suri Tani Pemuka. His operational experience shaped a structured, efficient, and practical approach to building software.

## Skills & Interests
- Fullstack web development (Next.js, Node.js)
- REST API design and backend systems
- Third-party integrations
- Clean application architecture

## How He Works
Prefers simple, clear, and reliable solutions. Focused on building systems that are easy to understand and scalable.

## Current
- Working in warehouse operations
- Building personal fullstack projects
- Growing toward end-to-end system development
